name: test_using_a_case_expression_in_a_where_positive_case
description: /Users/dpp/*project/newdb/cyphertck/gdm-tck/features/0-original/neo4j/CaseExpression.feature: [9] Using a CASE expression in a WHERE, positive case
descriptionHtml: /Users/dpp/*project/newdb/cyphertck/gdm-tck/features/0-original/neo4j/CaseExpression.feature: [9] Using a CASE expression in a WHERE, positive case
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Expected results but query failed: Query execution failed: {code: Neo.ClientError.Statement.SyntaxError} {message: Invalid statement syntax: cypher:  --> 3:41
  |
3 |          WHEN id(n) >= 0 THEN size((n)-->())
  |                                         ^---
  |
  = expected primary}
Cypher: MATCH (n)
WHERE (CASE
         WHEN id(n) >= 0 THEN size((n)-->())
         ELSE 42
       END) > 0
RETURN n
